body.title: agent_datacenter: Igor device — full self-description, health, ops
body.result: IgorDevice + IgorShim shipped; tmux health check, blocked.flag, 96/96 tests pass
body.description:
Implement IgorDevice — Igor's concrete BaseDevice implementation. This registers Igor on the rack and gives the skeleton visibility into Igor's health.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/devices/igor/device.py (lives in agent_datacenter repo):
  class IgorDevice(BaseDevice):
    who_am_i() → {'name': igor_instance_name, 'version': git_hash, 'purpose': 'graph matrix reasoning engine'}
    requirements() → {'postgres': True, 'imap_bus': True, 'tmux_session': IGOR_TMUX_SESSION}
    capabilities() → reads igor.switches.cfg, returns dict of enabled features
    comms() → {'read_write': True, 'push': True, 'pull': True, 'nudge': False}
    health() → {'brainstem_running': bool, 'ne_running': bool, 'recent_error_rate': float, 'queue_depth': int}
    uptime() → seconds from igor_boot_history record
    startup_errors() → query clan.memories for ERROR type in last 5min
    logs() → {'path': datacenter_logs/igor/, 'subsystems': list of subdirs}
    update_info() → {'method': 'git pull + restart', 'current_commit': git_hash}
    where_and_how() → {'tmux_session': IGOR_TMUX_SESSION, 'instance': instance_name, 'pid': os.getpid()}

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/igor/device.py

Design rules:
- oop-first: IgorDevice class; capabilities() reads switches.cfg (no hardcoding)
- no-sqlite: health() queries Postgres, not SQLite

Scope boundary:
IN: full BaseDevice implementation for Igor, 16 methods, reads live Igor state
OUT: subprocess lifecycle (T-adc-igor-shim), block-manual-only rule (T-adc-igor-block-manual-only)

Test plan:
- IgorDevice() instantiates (all abstract methods implemented)
- health() returns correct shape when Igor is running
- capabilities() returns dict with at least 'hypothesize' key (always enabled)
- where_and_how() returns tmux session name from env
